name: rockstarr-content
description: Rockstarr AI long-form drafting plugin. Four publishing lanes (researched blog, thought leadership, email newsletter, LinkedIn newsletter) gated by the client's stack cadence, plus interview-driven case studies and repurposed derivatives. v0.5 adds the strategic content-planning layer: seo-strategy runs a six-phase keyword research + topic clustering workflow that produces a canonical backlog of 25-32 prioritized blog topics organized into 4-5 pillar+supporting clusters; ideate-topics reads the backlog monthly and prefers backlog items over fresh ideation; content-calendar enforces pillar-before-supports sequencing; outline-blog defaults internal links to pillar+peer supports for cluster cohesion. The deprecated draft-article shim is removed in v0.5. Researched-blog lane (v0.4) runs an external WebSearch research phase at outline time, requires an FAQ section in the body, enforces inline [Source: URL] citations and a 13-item SEO/GEO quality checklist as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Thought-leadership lane (v0.3) runs the canonical TL rubric as Pass 1 before stop-slop. Every lane drafts in the client's approved voice from first-party knowledge base material; third-party sources are cited inline and listed in References, never paraphrased as the client's voice. Requires rockstarr-infra v0.8.2+ for the shared blog-seo-geo reference; v0.8.1+ for the TL rubric; v0.4+ for the rest.
